# Dheiver Santos, PhD

> Independent AI advisor based in Brazil. PhD in Chemical Engineering with emphasis on Artificial Intelligence (UFBA/UFRJ), postdoctoral research at UNICAMP/UNIT (CNPq) and UFAL (FUNDEPES). Senior Staff Machine Learning Engineer at SX Negócios; former Senior Scientist at Grupo Boticário (GAVB); professor of AI, distributed systems and data science at UPE and Estácio. Creator of Mangaba.AI (open-source framework for autonomous AI agent teams) and founder of Cognai (AI healthtech for cardiology). 550+ academic citations, h-index 12.

## Services

- Executive Training & Programs: structured programs on AI hallucination, emergent behavior, systemic bias and responsible delegation, for boards and leadership teams. In-person or remote.
- AI Review & Assessment: independent risk assessment of AI models, architecture, processes and costs. Deliverable is a prioritized, actionable risk map. No code access required.
- Custom AI Model Training & Fine-Tuning: fine-tuning (LoRA or full) of language models on the client's own data for proprietary, Big Tech-independent models deployed on-premise or in private cloud. Includes technical team training.
